Data.Name: Street Pack
Data.Description: A worn but roomy pack with enough slots for field gear.
Data.FlavorText: Scuffed canvas, patched straps, still dependable.

Data.Name: Staccato Pistol
Data.Description: A compact sidearm tuned for close-quarter reliability.
Data.FlavorText: It kicks a little harder than it looks.

Data.Name: Orion Breacher
Data.Description: A short scattergun built for brutal apartment-distance work.
Data.FlavorText: Every wall suddenly feels negotiable.

Data.Name: Padded Jacket
Data.Description: Flexible street armor with stitched ceramic pads.
Data.FlavorText: Less style than a trench, more survival than a hoodie.

Data.Name: Trauma Kit
Data.Description: A compact emergency kit with fast-seal injectors.
Data.FlavorText: Patch first. Panic later.

Data.Name: Light Ammo
Data.Description: A tidy box of pistol rounds.
Data.FlavorText: Enough to feel brave for a little while.

Data.Name: Impact Shells
Data.Description: Heavy shells that throw hard, blunt force downrange.
Data.FlavorText: The kind of sound that makes a corridor reconsider itself.

Data.Name: Flechette Shells
Data.Description: A slashing scatter load for soft targets and exposed mechanisms.
Data.FlavorText: Tiny blades, ugly arithmetic.

Data.Name: Battery Cell
Data.Description: A charge cell for field electronics and improvised hacks.
Data.FlavorText: Still humming with residual charge.

Data.Name: Field Ration
Data.Description: Dense calories in a silvered pouch.
Data.FlavorText: Tastes like cardboard and optimism.

Data.Name: Loose Cache
Data.Description: A scavenged bundle left out in the open.
Data.FlavorText: Someone meant to come back for it.

Data.Name: Spare Magazine
Data.Description: A loaded magazine wrapped in an elastic retention band.
Data.FlavorText: Always easier to carry than regret.

Data.Name: Stim Patch
Data.Description: A disposable combat stimulant with a short burn window.
Data.FlavorText: A bad idea that often arrives just in time.

Data.Name: Scrap Shiv
Data.Description: A sharpened strip of metal wrapped in tape.
Data.FlavorText: Ugly, honest, and still dangerous.

Data.Name: Tool Case
Data.Description: A compact repair kit full of stubborn little miracles.
Data.FlavorText: Heavy enough to matter, useful enough to keep.

Data.Name: ripOS Flash Drive
Data.Description: A flash drive with a cracked installer cache and stolen operations data.
Data.FlavorText: Cheap plastic shell, expensive trouble.

Entries.Name: sigil_proxy.id
Entries.Summary: Disposable proxy identity used by a stolen access broker.

Entries.Name: critical_patch_v2.pch
Entries.Summary: Unsigned exploit mitigation for a known driver panic.

Entries.Name: programs
Entries.Summary: Installable programs and resident daemons.

Entries.Name: neural_boost.v3
Entries.Summary: A reflex assist package for local motor timing.

Entries.Name: synapse_optimizer.dmn
Entries.Summary: Resident process monitor for cracked driver firmware.

Entries.Name: wraith_exploit.mal
Entries.Summary: Known hostile payload held in quarantine.

Entries.Name: reflex_tuner.scm
Entries.Summary: Blueprint for a driver-level reflex tuning routine.

Entries.Name: memory_shard_771A.shd
Entries.Summary: Recovered private memory shard. Contents are encrypted.

Entries.Name: blackwall_key.ak
Entries.Summary: Partial access key fragment. Validation chain is incomplete.

Entries.Name: ghost_cred_340.gc
Entries.Summary: Offline currency packet with a suspicious escrow chain.

Data.Name: PROGNO.sys Compliance Drive
Data.Description: A locked corporate flash drive packed with certified utility programs.
Data.FlavorText: Every file has a policy number. Every policy has teeth.

Entries.Name: approved
Entries.Summary: Certified PROGNO.sys deployment payloads.

Entries.Name: audit_daemon.dmn
Entries.Summary: Resident compliance monitor.

Entries.Name: biometric_attestor.pg
Entries.Summary: Identity attestation and access control utility.

Entries.Name: claim_validator.pg
Entries.Summary: Contract and liability validation suite.

Entries.Name: contract_router.pg
Entries.Summary: Routes service actions through approved claim channels.

Entries.Name: liability_firewall.dmn
Entries.Summary: Denies uncertified execution paths.

Entries.Name: risk_matrix.pg
Entries.Summary: Operational risk scoring program.

Entries.Name: triage_core.pg
Entries.Summary: Corporate triage orchestration program.

Entries.Name: vendor_shadow.id
Entries.Summary: Unapproved vendor identity token.

Entries.Name: hyacinth_cert_bundle.pch
Entries.Summary: Current certificate bundle for PROGNO.sys hosts.

Entries.Name: ledger_sync_hotfix.pch
Entries.Summary: Approved synchronization hotfix.

Entries.Name: graymarket_loader.vx
Entries.Summary: Unsupported loader flagged by corporate policy.

Entries.Name: standard_claim_terminal.scm
Entries.Summary: Reference schematic for sanctioned claim terminals.

Data.Name: Street Ledger Stick
Data.Description: A battered storage stick full of accounts, identities, and contraband keys.
Data.FlavorText: Looks disposable. Probably worth more than the room.

Entries.Name: accounts
Entries.Summary: Broker account exports.

Entries.Name: aurora_clients.dat
Entries.Summary: Client list with partial payment history.

Entries.Name: tax_ghost.id
Entries.Summary: Spoofed financial identity bundle.

Entries.Name: clinic_backdoor.ak
Entries.Summary: Door access key for a private clinic.

Entries.Name: courtroom_clip.shd
Entries.Summary: Encrypted memory shard marked as legal evidence.

Entries.Name: night_market_credits.gc
Entries.Summary: Offline currency escrow packet.

Data.Name: Utility Driver Key
Data.Description: A small flash drive with service daemons and field patches.
Data.FlavorText: The kind of key that opens doors by making the door forget it is locked.

Entries.Name: drivers
Entries.Summary: Field driver payloads.

Entries.Name: redline_proxy.dmn
Entries.Summary: Proxy daemon for redline comms.

Entries.Name: null_route_fix.pch
Entries.Summary: Routing patch for misconfigured field nodes.

Entries.Name: port_knocker.pg
Entries.Summary: Timed access probe utility.

Entries.Name: signal_lift.pg
Entries.Summary: Low power wireless range booster.

Data.Name: Gorilla Arm Mk.I
Data.Description: A reinforced hydraulic arm replacement with integrated grip enhancement.
Data.FlavorText: Subtle as a sledgehammer. Twice as reliable.

Data.Name: Kiroshi Optics v2
Data.Description: A neural-linked optical implant with enhanced low-light and zoom overlay.
Data.FlavorText: The world looks different when you can see every pore.

Data.Name: Reflex Booster
Data.Description: A spinal implant that accelerates neural signal routing for faster reaction times.
Data.FlavorText: You feel it in the twitch before you think.

Data.Name: Personal Satchel
Data.Description: A civilian carry satchel with soft dividers and a magnetic clasp.
Data.FlavorText: Professional enough for a concierge lobby, practical enough for a bad day.

Data.Name: Rescue Inhaler
Data.Description: A compact inhaler prescribed for acute stress episodes.
Data.FlavorText: Fast relief, bitter aftertaste.

Data.Name: Credstick Wallet
Data.Description: A thin crypto wallet keyed to a premium lifestyle account.
Data.FlavorText: Lightweight, encrypted, expensive.

Data.Name: Civic Datapad
Data.Description: A consumer tablet full of appointments, receipts, and personal notes.
Data.FlavorText: Cracked at the corner, still polished everywhere else.

Data.Name: Executive Holdout
Data.Description: A compact defensive pistol issued for emergency escort protocols.
Data.FlavorText: Small enough to ignore until it is not.

Data.Name: Holdout Magazine
Data.Description: A slim magazine of light defensive rounds.
Data.FlavorText: Insurance-grade courage.

Data.Name: Dexline Pistol Kit
Data.Description: A small carry pouch for spare ammunition and field odds.
Data.FlavorText: Practical, forgettable, useful.

Data.Name: Dexline Pistol
Data.Description: A functional weapon seeded for combat and targeting tests.
Data.FlavorText: Loaded through the same rules as every other gun.

Data.Name: Dexline Rounds
Data.Description: A loaded ammunition stack for this character's weapon.
Data.FlavorText: No shortcuts; just a stack of ammo attached into the gun.
